subject.title: Expected ToolLoopAgent to always generate Output regardless of stopCondition and tool results. AI_NoOutputGeneratedError
subject.body:
### Description `ToolLoopAgent` with `stepCountIs`, `maxSteps`, `tools` and `output: Output.object({...})` makes a hard stop upon reaching `stepCountIs` and throws with `AI_NoOutputGeneratedError` I would expect the "Loop" agent understand that tools can run multiple times in a loop, so checking if all tools were called + stopCondition met doesn't mean a hard stop as long as `output` is provided, it should always try to generate an output. In my case I had 2 tools and `stopWhen: stepCountIs(6)`. LoopAgent called tools several times, ultimately reaching the limit of 6 steps and returning the last tool_result which triggered `AI_NoOutputGeneratedError` immediatly Relevant AI sdk code with the condition that ignores the fact that this is a loop and that there's an output expected https://github.com/vercel/ai/blob/main/packages/ai/src/generate-text/generate-text.ts#L1108 response in traces: ` 'ai.response.finishReason': 'tool-calls'`
Traces of the loop agent ``` const attributes_custom = { 'ai.response.model': 'gemini-3.1-pro-preview', 'ai.response.reasoning': '**REDACTED.\n\n\n', 'operation.name': 'ai.generateText.doGenerate search-supplier-names-for-event-plan', 'ai.usage.completionTokens': 312, 'ai.model.provider': 'google.vertex.chat', 'ai.model.id': 'gemini-3.1-pro-preview', 'ai.response.finishReason': 'tool-calls', 'ai.prompt.messages': '[{"role":"system","content":"\\n\\n .....redacted"},"providerOptions":{"vertex":{"thoughtSignature":"FOO_REDACTED"}}}]}]', 'ai.prompt.tools': [ '{"type":"function","name":"webSearchSubAgentTool","description":".....redacted ","inputSchema":{"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","type":"object","properties":{"webSearchAgentInstructions":{"type":"string","description":"Instructions prompt for this agent with web_search tool"}},"required":["webSearchAgentInstructions"],"additionalProperties":false}}', '{"type":"function","name":"evaluateSupplierNameResultsSubagentTool","description":"Subagent tool for evaluating your supplier name search results sub against initial requirements. Use this as an agent-to-agent tool to get external feedback on the quality of the results you gathered","inputSchema":{"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","type":"object","properties":{"supplierNameResultsForEvaluation":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Supplier name and location identifier"},"eventRequirementIds":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"IDs of event requirements that the supplier should be considered for."},"suitabilityReasons":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","description":"Reason why this supplier is a good fit for the associated event requirement."},"description":"Array of reasons explaining why this supplier is a good fit for the associated event requirements."},"suitabilityScore":{"description":"Suitability score ranging from 0.1 to 1.0, rounded to one decimal place (e.g., 0.3, 0.7, 0.9). Indicating supplier suitability and your data accuracy confidence for a given event and matching requirements. Default to 0.5 if not provided","default":0.5,"type":"number","minimum":0.1,"maximum":1},"suitabilityScoreReasoning":{"description":"Reasoning for the suitability score, including confidence in the data. The scale is always 0.1 (lowest suitability) to 1.0 (highest suitability). Please also mention the scale that was used (0.1 - 1 by default), so the next Agent could process it correctly","anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}]},"supplierType":{"description":"The type or category of supplier (e.g., \\"hotel\\", \\"restaurant\\", \\"transportation\\"). Null if the type cannot be determined from search results.","anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}]}},"required":["name","eventRequirementIds","suitabilityReasons"],"additionalProperties":false},"description":"Supplier name search results to evaluate"},"originalEventInfoInputs":{"type":"string","description":"Original event info inputs like briefing, requirements and event info so the subagent could evaluate results accurately"}},"required":["supplierNameResultsForEvaluation","originalEventInfoInputs"],"additionalProperties":false}}', ], 'ai.response.toolCalls': '[{"toolCallId":"lq8vRK8xzt1FuuID","toolName":"webSearchSubAgentTool","input":"{\\"webSearchAgentInstructions\\":\\"........\\"}"}]', 'ai.response.providerMetadata': '{"vertex":{"promptFeedback":null,"groundingMetadata":null,"urlContextMetadata":null,"safetyRatings":null,"usageMetadata":{"thoughtsTokenCount":202,"promptTokenCount":5523,"candidatesTokenCount":110,"totalTokenCount":5835,"trafficType":"ON_DEMAND_PRIORITY"}}}', 'ai.operationId': 'ai.generateText.doGenerate', 'ai.prompt.toolChoice': '{"type":"auto"}', 'ai.request.headers.user-agent': 'ai/6.0.100', 'ai.telemetry.functionId': 'search-supplier-names-for-event-plan', 'ai.usage.promptTokens': 5523, 'ai.settings.maxRetries': 2, } ```
``` const SEARCH_AGENT_MODEL_TYPE: ModelType = 'google-vertex:gemini-3.1-pro-preview' const searchSupplierNamesForEventPlanAgent = new ToolLoopAgent({ model: modelProviderRegistry.languageModel(SEARCH_AGENT_MODEL_TYPE), providerOptions: { vertex: { thinkingConfig: { thinkingLevel: 'high', includeThoughts: true, structuredOutputs: true, }, }, }, tools: { webSearchSubAgentTool, evaluateResultsSubagentTool, }, toolChoice: 'auto', stopWhen: stepCountIs(MAX_TOTAL_STEPS), experimental_telemetry: { isEnabled: true, recordInputs: true, recordOutputs: true, functionId: 'search-supplier-names-for-event-plan', }, callOptionsSchema: z.object({ eventRequirementCount: z.number(), }), prepareStep: ({ stepNumber, messages }) => { if (stepNumber >= MAX_TOTAL_STEPS - 1) { return { messages: [...messages, User(['Please prepare a final response now'])], } } }, output: Output.object({ schema: supplierInfoResultsSchema, }), instructions: SYSTEM_PROMPT, }) ``` ### AI SDK Version At a time of the bug the versions were ``` "@ai-sdk/anthropic": "3.0.47", "@ai-sdk/google": "3.0.31", "@ai-sdk/google-vertex": "4.0.63", "@ai-sdk/openai": "3.0.33", "ai": "6.0.100", ``` So couple of minor versions behind, since then we updated. But I don't see any changes that could have improved it ### Code of Conduct - [x] I agree to follow this project's Code of Conduct
